starterFiles.content:
# Community Site

Local events and resources.

# Community Site

Local events and resources.

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- community-site mkdir -p -- community-site git -C community-site init -q -b main git -C community-site config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C community-site config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s '# Community Site Local events and resources. ' > community-site/README.md mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events

' > community-site/index.html mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > community-site/styles.css mkdir -p -- community-site/notes printf %s 'Archive the spring event list. ' > community-site/notes/old-events.txt mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s 'console.log('"'"'legacy preview'"'"'); ' > community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Start community site' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' > community-site/index.html git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Update community heading' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > community-site/styles.css git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Space community footer'

# Community Site

Local events and resources.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu repo=community-site fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; } git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing." [ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main." [ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits." [ -n "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The expected unfinished change is missing." [ -f "$repo/pages/events.html" ] || fail 'pages/events.html is missing.' [ "$(cat "$repo/pages/events.html")" = ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' ] || fail 'pages/events.html does not contain the required text.' [ ! -e "$repo/index.html" ] || fail 'index.html should not exist.'

#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- community-site mkdir -p -- community-site git -C community-site init -q -b main git -C community-site config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C community-site config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s '# Community Site Local events and resources. ' > community-site/README.md mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events

' > community-site/index.html mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > community-site/styles.css mkdir -p -- community-site/notes printf %s 'Archive the spring event list. ' > community-site/notes/old-events.txt mkdir -p -- community-site/dist printf %s 'console.log('"'"'legacy preview'"'"'); ' > community-site/dist/legacy-preview.js git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Start community site' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' > community-site/index.html git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Update community heading' mkdir -p -- community-site printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > community-site/styles.css git -C community-site add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C community-site commit -q -m 'Space community footer' rm -f -- community-site/index.html rm -f -- community-site/notes/old-events.txt rmdir -- community-site/notes 2>/dev/null || true mkdir -p -- community-site/pages printf %s ' Community Site

Community Events and Resources

' > community-site/pages/events.html git -C community-site add -A

# Community Site

Local events and resources.

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=community-site
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is not on main."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 4 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ -z "$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain)" ] || fail "The working tree is not clean yet."
expected=$(printf "%s\n" 'README.md
dist/legacy-preview.js
pages/events.html
styles.css' | sort)
actual=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files | sort)
[ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct."

learningGoals: Rename a tracked path with git mv
Remove a tracked path with git rm
Review and commit a structural cleanup
